name: Sekolah Ciputra

intelligence.verdict: Parents say Sekolah Ciputra is one of the few CIS-accredited IB schools in the Greater Jakarta area, and the full IB continuum is well-established.
paragraphs: Parents say Sekolah Ciputra is one of the few CIS-accredited IB schools in the Greater Jakarta area, and the full IB continuum is well-established.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$4.9K – US$19K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Key results: IB Average 34, IB Pass Rate 95%.
Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: Science laboratories, Libraries, Sports facilities, Arts studios, Technology labs.
